description:
Cross-language consistency fixture for the Ralph loop strategy (issue #58).

Ralph is a multi-context-window continuation loop. Each case scripts the per-window state the agent writes to `.spore/progress.json` (`windows`: one entry per context window, `{complete, remaining}`), the outer-loop reset cap (`max_resets`, B3), and the expected terminal RunResult. The completion mechanism is the registered Stop hook reading `.spore/progress.json` (B1); the strategy resets the context window (fresh SessionState, reload `.spore/progress.json` + `.spore/feature_list.json` from the filesystem — B4: no git) until completion passes or `max_resets` windows are exhausted.

  - the first `complete:true` (with empty `remaining`) window at index i => Success at iteration i+1.
  - all windows incomplete up to `max_resets` => Failure { RalphCompletionUnmet { iterations: max_resets } }.

Expected.kind is one of: success | completion_unmet. `iterations` is the number of context windows run.
